name: giveabit-hq
description: Give A Bit HQ — single-version stamp, network-only shell SW, mobile polish

scripts.build: npm run stamp && mkdir -p public/metrics public/schemas public/docs/projects public/handoff && cp control-panel.html public/index.html && cp hq.css hq.js sw.js public/ && cp projects.json agents.json tools.json status.example.json manifest.webmanifest public/ && cp pages/_headers pages/_redirects public/ && cp -R metrics/. public/metrics/ && cp -R schemas/. public/schemas/ && cp docs/*.md public/docs/ 2>/dev/null; cp -R docs/projects/. public/docs/projects/ 2>/dev/null; cp handoff/state.json public/handoff/ 2>/dev/null; (test -f status.json && cp status.json public/ || true); (test -f favicon.png && cp favicon.png apple-touch-icon.png public/ || true)
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy ./public --project-name=giveabit-hq
